channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Congress and AAP demand high-level probe into alleged irregularities in Ram Temple donation case
item.description: Congress and the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) have raised serious allegations regarding irregularities in the Ram Janmabhoomi Temple donation and construction-related funds, calling for a high-level, Supreme...

item.title: Messi and Argentina prepare for knockout clash against Cape Verde as World Cup scoring race heats up
item.description: Lionel Messi and defending champions Argentina are preparing for a crucial knockout stage match against Cape Verde in Miami Gardens, with a place in the round of 16 at stake. Messi continues to be one...

item.title: DCEA launches regional manhunt for fugitive Tanzanian drug traffickers

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly begin marriage in high-profile ceremony

item.title: MINI launches limited-run John Cooper Works Daredevil Edition range in South Africa

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly hold high-profile wedding events at Madison Square Garden amid media speculation

item.title: England’s World Cup victory over DR Congo attracts 16.3 million UK TV viewers
item.description: A peak audience of 16.3 million viewers tuned in across BBC platforms to watch England’s dramatic World Cup victory over DR Congo, making it the most-watched moment on BBC television so far in 2026. T...

item.title: Economists respond to weaker-than-expected U.S. June jobs report showing 57,000 new jobs
item.description: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics released its June employment report, revealing weaker-than-expected job growth and prompting reactions from economists and industry observers. According to the data...

item.title: Eala and Bartunkova eliminated by Ostapenko and Kenin in Wimbledon doubles
item.description: Filipina tennis player Alex Eala and her partner Nicola Bartunkova saw their Wimbledon doubles campaign come to an end after losing to the 8th-seeded pair of Jelena Ostapenko and Sofia Kenin. The matc...

item.title: UK government signals potential regulatory intervention in Paramount–Warner Bros Discovery takeover
item.description: The UK government has indicated that it is likely to intervene in Paramount Skydance’s proposed $110 billion (£83 billion) acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery, raising the prospect of further regula...

item.title: Kenyan government to receive Sh200 billion from partial Safaricom stake sale to Vodacom
item.description: The Kenyan government is set to receive more than Sh200 billion following the sale of a 15 percent stake in Safaricom to South Africa’s Vodacom group, according to National Treasury Cabinet Secretary ...

item.title: Rep. Lisa McClain defends capitalism and urges critics of U.S. system to leave during Newsmax interview

item.title: Top stories: Canada–U.S. relations, Canadian migration trends, and key national updates

item.title: Analyst says JD Vance remarks on Iran negotiations highlight strategic messaging around oil supply and diplomacy
item.description: A political analyst has interpreted recent comments by U.S. Vice President JD Vance as revealing underlying strategic considerations in ongoing diplomatic discussions with Iran. During remarks attribu...

item.title: Klopp emerges as leading candidate to replace Nagelsmann after Germany World Cup exit
item.description: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has reportedly become the frontrunner to take over as Germany national team coach following the country’s disappointing exit from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Reports...

item.title: Health officials confirm West Nile virus detection in Nashville mosquitoes and urge prevention measures
item.description: Health officials in Nashville, Tennessee, have confirmed the detection of West Nile virus in a mosquito sample collected in North Nashville, marking the first positive finding of the virus in the area...

item.title: OpenAI explores proposal for U.S. government equity stake amid AI regulation discussions
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly in early discussions about a proposal that would give the Trump administration a 5% equity stake in the company, according to a Financial Times report. The idea is part of broader...

item.title: Large-scale Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv leaves multiple casualties and widespread destruction
item.description: Russia launched a large-scale aerial assault on Ukraine’s capital Kyiv in the early hours of July 2, 2026, firing hundreds of drones and dozens of missiles in what officials described as one of the mo...
